request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but honestly, look at what happened in [Redacted City] last year. When that power grid went down for 3 days, the local emergency response was a total mess. The schools didn't have backup generators, and the hospitals were running on fumes. We were lucky no one died. That's why I support more funding for civil preparedness - not just for big disasters, but for the everyday emergencies that could hit any of our communities. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
